capabilities.title: Workflow and systems integration
capabilities.summary: Connect fragmented tools, remove repeated data movement, and make operational information trustworthy.

capabilities.title: A.I. and automation enablement
capabilities.summary: Apply A.I. and automation to well-defined work with clear review, governance, and human accountability.

capabilities.title: Practical software development
capabilities.summary: Build focused applications, dashboards, and tools around the way the organization actually works.

capabilities.title: Technology strategy and modernization
capabilities.summary: Clarify the decision, reduce unnecessary complexity, and sequence modernization into useful moves.

capabilities.title: Reliability and performance engineering
capabilities.summary: Improve resilience, observability, delivery confidence, and the speed of systems people depend on.
